name: Analyst Harness Evaluation
description: Exercises the full harness loop: schema discovery -> validated SQL -> render. Uses rubric-based metrics because the schema-discovery trajectory is non-deterministic.

parts.text: Chart the monthly completed-order revenue by region from the analyst_demo dataset, and tell me the headline finding.
Compare total completed-order revenue by customer plan tier in analyst_demo and show it as a chart with the key takeaway.
